title: SALESPERSON/BRAND REPRESENTATIVE
description:
What You’ll Do

  • Be the front-facing representative of established partner brands, representing them professionally at events and roadshows

  • Engage customers with confidence and clearly explain how the brand’s services add real value

  • Convert quality conversations into successful sign-ups and smooth onboardings

  • Work closely with a driven team to execute campaigns and improve results consistently

  • Deliver a positive, memorable customer experience that strengthens trust and brand loyalty

Why This Role Is Worth Your Time

  • Weekly payouts every Friday – consistent, no long waiting periods

  • No experience required – structured one-to-one training, proven scripts, and on-ground coaching provided

  • Work in a high-energy, supportive environment where effort and results are recognised

  • Referral incentives – earn additional income by introducing friends to the team

  • Regular team bonding and social activities (KBBQ, hotpot, laser tag, KTV, etc.)

  • Exclusive gym membership to support your health and lifestyle

  • Clear opportunities for leadership roles, career progression, and overseas exposure

This is not a dead-end role. Many team members start on the ground and progress into team lead, trainer, or management positions based on performance—not seniority.

Who Thrives Here

  • You enjoy engaging with people and building rapport quickly

  • You bring a positive, coachable mindset and are open to learning

  • You want income and personal growth, not just routine work

  • You are motivated, disciplined, and goal-oriented

Basic Requirements

  • 18 years old and above

  • Singaporean or Permanent Resident (PR)

  • Minimum 3-month commitment

  • Able to work 5–6 days per week (day shifts)

postedCompany.description:
We are a results-driven outsourced sales and marketing company that partners with reputable brands to accelerate customer acquisition, market expansion, and revenue growth. By deploying highly trained, performance-focused teams, we act as a seamless extension of our clients’ sales operations.

What We Do

We specialise in direct sales, field marketing, and customer acquisition, executing high-impact campaigns through events, roadshows, and face-to-face engagements. Our approach combines structured training, data-driven performance management, and consistent on-ground execution to deliver measurable results for our partners.


Our People & Culture

We invest heavily in people development. Team members receive continuous coaching, leadership training, and clear career progression opportunities. High performers are recognised through incentives, leadership roles, and overseas exposure, creating a culture that rewards ambition, discipline, and results.

Our Mission

To help brands grow efficiently while developing top-tier sales professionals through structured systems, real-world experience, and performance-based advancement.
postedCompany.name: STALLIONSWORK
